latest_summary: Unresolved GUID references in list attributes can be mapped to data sources via custom resolvers.

history.summary: Bulk export limits concurrent resource reads to 10 by default, or to the provider max_clients setting when configured.
Bulk export writes export_errors.json in the export directory when individual resources fail to export.
When not using the legacy architect flow exporter, exported flow configurations may be more complete because sanitized flow data is preserved during export.
Export work runs concurrently using the configured max_concurrent_threads limit.
Flow dependency resolution is more reliable when exporting resources with add_depends_on enabled, including improved depends_on generation and duplicate-flow handling.
Flow exports that generate output files use the archy export service to download flow configuration; exports without output files use the legacy flow exporter.
Exported teams with no members include member_ids = [] instead of omitting the attribute.
Routing queue exports resolve conditional_group_activation.rules.groups.member_group_id references.
Failures in custom file writers for exported resources are reported as errors instead of warnings, causing the export to fail.
Permission errors encountered while listing resources during export are collected and reported at the end of the export run.
Per-resource JSON files are named data_<resource_type>.json instead of <resource_type>.json.
Resource discovery retries transient failures up to three times with backoff.
Concurrent resource retrieval is limited to reduce API rate-limit errors.
Unresolved GUID references in list attributes can be mapped to data sources via custom resolvers.

latest_summary: Exclusions are applied when exporters are loaded, in addition to the final output pass.

history.summary: Invalid entries are skipped with a warning instead of failing the export; exclusions are applied in a final pass so they work for resource types discovered during dependency resolution.
Exclusions are applied when exporters are loaded, in addition to the final output pass.

latest_summary: Accepts a resource type without a label suffix (equivalent to type::) to replace all exported instances of that type with data sources.

history.summary: Accepts a resource type without a label suffix (equivalent to type::) to replace all exported instances of that type with data sources.

latest_summary: When using exclude_filter_resources or the default export mode, enable_dependency_resolution no longer adds depends_on blocks even when set to true.

history.summary: When using include_filter_resources or include_filter_resources_by_id, enable_dependency_resolution now controls depends_on generation without requiring a non-empty resource-type filter list.
When using exclude_filter_resources or the default export mode, enable_dependency_resolution no longer adds depends_on blocks even when set to true.

latest_summary: The value set in configuration is now honored; provider max_clients is used only as a fallback when max_concurrent_threads is not explicitly set.

history.summary: Optional maximum number of concurrent export threads (default 10). Changing this value forces replacement of the export resource.
The value set in configuration is now honored; provider max_clients is used only as a fallback when max_concurrent_threads is not explicitly set.

latest_summary: Filter attributes resource_types, include_filter_resources, exclude_filter_resources, and include_filter_resources_by_id are mutually exclusive.

history.summary: Export can complete with warnings for non-fatal issues instead of treating all diagnostics as hard failures.
Filter attributes resource_types, include_filter_resources, exclude_filter_resources, and include_filter_resources_by_id are mutually exclusive.

latest_summary: Optional list of {resourceType}::{resourceId} values to export only specific resources by ID.

history.summary: Optional list of {resourceType}::{resourceId} values to export only specific resources by ID.

latest_summary: Optional boolean (defaults to true). When false, architect flow YAML files are downloaded as part of the export process.

history.summary: Optional boolean (defaults to true). When false, architect flow YAML files are downloaded as part of the export process.
